name: Apricot Tea Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Almonds, blanched and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place butter in a large bowl and beat on medium speed until light and smooth.
2. Gradually add salt, sugar, and 1/3 cup of apricot preserves to the butter mixture. Beat until smooth.
3. Add egg yolks, baking powder, almonds, lemon zest, and orange zest to the mixture. Beat until well blended.
4. Gradually add flour to the dough until a soft, pliable dough forms.
5. Place chopped almonds in a shallow bowl or pan.
6. Pinch off 1-inch pieces of dough and roll into balls. Roll each ball in chopped almonds until evenly coated.
7. Refrigerate uncooked cookies for 5-10 minutes if they are too soft to handle.
8. Arrange cookies about 2 inches apart on the prepared parchment paper sheets.
9. Make a deep indentation in the center of each cookie using the back of a spoon.
10. Fill each indentation with about 1/4 teaspoon of apricot preserves.
11. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 5 minutes on the center rack.
12. Remove cookies from oven and let stand on wire racks to cool for 2-3 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
13. Place parchment paper between each layer of cooled cookies and store in an airtight container.
